query:
-- Search for existing matched services with these AAPT AVC IDs
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.customerName, s.customerExternalId, s.connectionId, s.locationAddress
FROM services s
WHERE s.connectionId IN ('100934625', '100805284', '100907679')
   OR s.connectionId LIKE '%100934625%' OR s.connectionId LIKE '%100805284%'
LIMIT 10;
